title: German Herb Bread
description: A traditional German bread infused with fresh herbs, perfect for any occasion.
instructions: Combine herb and water in a bowl, let it sit for 10 minutes.
Add the mixture to the bread, mix well.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth.
Let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Shape the dough into a loaf, place it on a baking sheet.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
Let the bread cool on a wire rack before slicing.
